Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction · Solon Tax 2026

PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Maintainability Enhancements
Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction · Solon Tax 2026

Roadmap Initiative
Maintainability Enhancements
Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction · Solon Tax 2026

4,580
Total Hours
10
Features
GRC
Requester

4,580
Total Hours

10
Features

GRC
Requester

Strategic Case
01
Tech Debt Reduction
Restructures revenue-management-be-custom to hexagonal architecture, improving maintainability and reducing long-term technical debt across all delivery teams.
02
Critical Platform Upgrades
Implements Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, and Oracle 26ai to keep the platform secure, supported, and performant for current and future jurisdictions.
03
Configuration Management
Introduces a dedicated Config Items Management tool for safely packaging and migrating configurations across environments without manual risk.
Key Features
Hexagonal Architecture Refactor
Restructure revenue-management-be-custom to clean hexagonal architecture with improved separation of concerns, enhanced testability, and reduced coupling.
In Design 1,200h
Java 25 Upgrade
Migrate codebase to Java 25 to leverage virtual threads, pattern matching, and significant performance improvements for high-volume tax operations.
In Progress 640h
Spring Boot 4.x Migration
Upgrade to Spring Boot 4.x with enhanced observability, native compilation support, improved dependency management, and critical security patches.
In Progress 480h
Oracle 26ai Database Migration
Migrate to Oracle 26ai to harness AI-powered query optimisation, advanced analytics, and improved performance for high-volume tax transaction processing.
To Do 420h
Cross-Team UI Tech Debt
Systematic UI improvements and technical debt reduction spanning ATH, EOS, SPA, HEL, and DAID teams for long-term platform sustainability.
In Progress 220h
Config Items Management Tool
Dedicated tool for safely packaging, versioning, and migrating configurations across development, staging, and production without manual intervention.
In Design 380h

agenticCustomInput:
An instance for each initiative under "core self service capabilities": 
SELF SERVICE SERVICES MANAGEMENT
USER & 3RD PARTY ACCESS MANAGEMENT
agenticJsonResponse:
{"slides":{"slide_1":{"instances":[{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Self Service Services Management
Core Self Service Capabilities · Solon Tax 2026
835
Total Hours
2
Features
GRC, Other
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Enable Self-Service Portal Operational Independence
Portal users require ability to define and manage services without backend pass-through dependencies, ensuring operational autonomy and security.
02
Expand Self-Service Capability Scope
Operational reports and contact management in self-service extend platform functionality to taxpayers, reducing revenue authority workload significantly.
03
Reduce Technical Debt in Portal Architecture
Refactoring existing pages to work through services implementation eliminates legacy endpoints and improves system maintainability and performance.
Key Features
SS Enhancements - Refactor existing self service pages to work through services implementation - part 4 / Important
Admin defines services provided on portal and required portal resources with permissible operations for each service, enabling secure user access management.
Under Analysis 112h
SS operational reports/contacts -Jasper
Users generate and run operational reports and manage contacts in self-service portal, extending administrative capabilities to taxpayers.
To Do TBD
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
USER & 3RD PARTY ACCESS MANAGEMENT
CORE SELF SERVICE CAPABILITIES · Solon Tax 2026
3,531
Total Hours
7
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Implement Multi-Level Representation Framework
Support two-way, multi-level representations with configurable lifecycle and datetime validity, enabling complex delegation hierarchies required by tax authorities.
02
Enforce Temporal Access Control Precision
Capture start and end dates with timezone support for representations and user rights, ensuring accurate permission enforcement across date boundaries.
03
Enable RM-Based Representation Management
Revenue management users manage taxpayer authorizations directly, synchronizing with self-service in real-time and preventing conflicting delegations.
Key Features
Representations : Ability to define and manage Representations in RM (affecting SS users)
RM users create and manage representations for taxpayers with lifecycle support, synchronizing real-time with self-service portal.
Waiting Analysis Approval 1,493h
Representations : (A) Enhancements, configurability and permissions in Agreements (2ways,multilevels) /RM & SS
Admin configures two-way multi-level representations with lifecycle, status tracking, and source system integration for complex authorization scenarios.
Waiting Analysis Approval 448h
Representations : Define Date time and timezone for Representations and user rights /RM &SS
Capture and enforce start and end dates with timezone support for representations, ensuring accurate temporal validity across all access permissions.
Waiting Analysis Approval 448h
Representations : Form Types and Access to Apis as Services / Reference implementation
Admin defines agreement services based on form types and API access, enabling granular control over representative permissions for specific operations.
Waiting Analysis Approval 299h
Representations : Ability to relate attachments to Representations in RM (RM & SS)
Users relate authorization paperwork attachments to representations, maintaining audit trail of supporting documentation for delegated permissions.
Waiting Analysis Approval 320h
Representations : Additional info in Agreements /RM & SS
Capture source system, purpose, and external creation timestamps for representations, enabling audit trail and integration tracking.
Waiting Analysis Approval 523h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"}]}}}
